termsScreen.docSubtitle: Between the platform and the sports facility owner
termsScreen.introBody: This agreement is a binding electronic contract between the SHOOT'HA Business platform (the “Platform” or “Administration”) and the sports facility owner (the “Merchant” or “Field owner”). By tapping “I agree” or using the app’s services, the merchant declares full acceptance of all clauses below.
termsScreen.s1Body:
Commission rate: The field owner agrees that a commission of (15%) will be deducted from the total value of each booking completed through the SHOOT'HA Business app.

Crediting earnings: Electronic booking amounts are credited to the field owner’s in-app wallet as soon as the player successfully completes payment.

Withdrawals: The field owner may request a withdrawal when the available balance reaches the minimum threshold (50,000 IQD). The Platform undertakes to transfer the amount through the agreed channel within (24–48) business hours.
termsScreen.s2Body:
Protecting the booking: The field owner must secure the pitch for the player as soon as the booking appears as “Paid” in their control panel.

No-show: If the team does not attend and (15 minutes) have passed from the scheduled match time, the full booking amount is forfeited to the field owner (after the app’s commission is deducted), and the player may not claim a refund.

Attendance confirmation: The field owner must tap “Confirm attendance” or “Did not attend” to document the financial status and keep reports accurate.

Cancellation by the field: Paid bookings may not be cancelled except in proven cases of force majeure. In case of unjustified cancellation, the field owner bears responsibility to compensate the player or offer an alternative slot, and the Platform may suspend the field’s account.
termsScreen.s3Body:
Data accuracy: The field owner is responsible for the accuracy of prices, opening hours, and the field’s geographic location. Any double booking caused by failure to update data manually is solely the field owner’s responsibility.

Physical liability disclaimer: SHOOT'HA Business is a technical intermediary for booking coordination only and assumes no legal, financial, or customary (tribal) liability for injuries, fights, or death—God forbid—on the sports premises.

Safety of property: The field owner is responsible for protecting players’ personal belongings and providing a safe sporting environment.
termsScreen.s4Body:
Activity logs: Digital records stored on SHOOT'HA Business servers (audit logs) are the sole legal reference and decisive evidence in resolving any financial dispute between a player and the field owner.

Fraud attempts: Any attempt by the field owner to arrange with a player outside the app to evade commission, or to file false “no-show” reports to seize funds, will result in permanent account suspension and forfeiture of balances as compensation to the Platform.
termsScreen.s5Body: The field owner acknowledges that their electronic acceptance of this agreement has the same full legal effect as a handwritten signature under the laws in force in the Republic of Iraq.

privacyScreen.docSubtitle: Protecting field owners’ and facilities’ data
privacyScreen.introBody: The SHOOT'HA Business app administration is committed to protecting the privacy and security of data shared by field owners and sports facilities. This policy explains what data we collect, how we use it, and the safeguards we apply in line with applicable technical and legal standards.
privacyScreen.s1Body:
We collect only the data needed to run administrative and financial operations, including:

Account information: the authorized person’s full name, mobile phone number, and email address.

Facility data: field name, precise geographic location (GPS), facility photos, and available services.

Financial data: daily booking records, income and expense details, and e-wallet information linked to profit withdrawals.

Usage data: sign-in history, in-app interactions, and technical crash/error reports to improve the user experience.
privacyScreen.s2Body:
Data we collect is used exclusively for the following purposes:

Organizing and displaying booking schedules and facilitating communication with players.

Managing and processing financial transfers through the electronic payment gateway (Wayl).

Providing technical support and resolving financial or operational disputes.

Developing app features based on real usage statistics.

Sending essential notifications about new bookings or financial updates.
privacyScreen.s3Body:
We do not sell or rent your business data to marketing entities. Data is shared only with:

Payment gateway (Wayl): to collect payments and process withdrawals.

Google Maps: to show the field location accurately to players in the SHOOT'HA Business app.

Players (end users): they only see public field information (name, location, price, and available times) to complete a booking.
privacyScreen.s4Body:
All data is stored on cloud servers protected with advanced encryption.

All financial transactions are processed through a licensed payment gateway (Wayl). The SHOOT'HA Business app does not store sensitive bank card information for users or field owners.
privacyScreen.s5Body:
The field owner may at any time:

Update or correct facility or pricing data through the dashboard.

Request a copy of their financial records.

Request account closure and data deletion (subject to settling any outstanding financial matters with the platform).
privacyScreen.s6Body: We may update this policy periodically to reflect technical and legal changes. You will be notified of any material changes through official in-app notifications.
privacyScreen.s7Body: For any questions or reports regarding the privacy of your data, you can contact the payments and technical support team directly through the Support section in the app.
